title: Verify safe failure and status reporting
preconditions: Fixtures trigger every documented source, parser, account, reconciliation, overlap, compatibility, resource, LEDGER, and interruption category.
steps: Run each failure through the published process contract and inspect result, stderr, durable batch state, and mutation counters.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-FAILURE-STATUS holds, including stable next-action metadata, no payload disclosure, and correct last durable frontier.
